title: Shinji Commentary
wikitext:
[]: Shinji Commentary?             Quote Post by C.W.Robson46290 » Thu Feb 16, 2006 9:58 pm So I read somewhere on this website about Anno's explanation of Shinji's character. Does anyone know where I can find that to read it. That would extremely helpful and highly appreciated. P.S.: By the way, I can't read a bit of Japanese, so if this explanation is Japanese only oculd osmeone let me know that instead. Thanks again!

[]:             Quote Post by ThroneofDravaris » Thu Feb 16, 2006 10:58 pm When I read the title I thought this was going to be about Spike Spencerâ€™s rant at the end of Episode 26. That made me lol. Not sure if this is what you're talking about, but the first volume of the Evangelion Manga (VIZ edition) has a basic explanation of the Shinji character written by Hideaki Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Feb 17, 2006 12:54 pm Is this the one you mean? http://www.evamonkey.com/writings_anno01.php

[]:             Quote Post by C.W.Robson46290 » Fri Feb 17, 2006 6:21 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Is this the one you mean? http://www.evamonkey.com/writings_anno01.php

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Jul 05, 2006 3:00 pm ThroneofDravaris wrote: When I read the title I thought this was going to be about Spike Spencerâ€™s rant at the end of Episode 26. That made me lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Wed Jul 05, 2006 4:54 pm Here's the clip right here: [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=msEmnmxBgOw[/url] "You ran outta ink too, didn't ya, you bastards?" XD

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Jul 05, 2006 4:59 pm no heres my fav line " I mustnt run away I musnt run away. okay i got that but if i did run away. lets analyze this, where the fuck would i go?!"
